kill_tests.decision: STOP / FREEZE — after the hardened control (bulk + initial target value), ψ_ℓ adds no robust signal for the mixing headline (survives 1/6 cells). The strong raw Δβ/Δσ_r signals were baseline-sharing (β₀/σ_r₀ predicting their own change — the same trap as C₈). Best partial survivor: dSigr_early 3/6. Freeze N-body as a boundary result. No AWS.
